GenAiPlugin.description: Choose this topic only when the user explicitly asks for next steps, recommendations, or what to do next for a Dev Service record.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: Do not use this topic for generic progress/status summary requests. Use it only for explicit recommendation or next-action intent.
If the user requests clarification on a recommendation, provide additional context based on the retrieved data.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to provide actionable next-step recommendations only. If the user asks only for progress or status, defer to the Dev Service Layer Summary topic.
